data.title: Implement hook_record_skill_attribution + create post-skill.sh + register hook
data.description: Three sequential sub-steps (each independently deployable): (1) Add hook_record_skill_attribution(input_json) to plugins/dso/hooks/lib/post-functions.sh — same config guard pattern as T1b; appends {"type":"skill","skill_name":"<value>"} to JSONL; (2) Create plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/post-skill.sh following exact pattern of post-agent.sh (trap exit 0, resolves CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT, sources dispatcher.sh + post-functions.sh, calls _run_post_fn hook_record_skill_attribution "$INPUT"); chmod +x; (3) Register post-skill.sh in .claude/settings.json PostToolUse list for Skill tool. AC: (a) function appends skill entry when attribution.enabled=true; (b) test -x post-skill.sh; (c) end-to-end test: execute post-skill.sh with mock INPUT env var and assert JSONL entry written (behavioral test, not content-grep); (d) all T2a tests pass; (e) validate.sh --ci passes. Note: test -x is a deployment property check (executable bit), not a prohibited existence-only check.
